name: python3-unicodedata2
title: python3-unicodedata2
description:
Python unicodedata backport/updates
This package provides backports and updates to Python's standard unicodedata.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-unicodedata2 because Python unicodedata backport/updates.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-unicodedata2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-unicodedata2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-unicodedata2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
